senses.en: to switch off, to turn off
senses.example_en: Please switch off the TV.

senses.example_de: Im Urlaub kann ich richtig abschalten.
senses.example_en: On vacation I can really switch off.

examples.de: Er schaltet abends sein Handy ab.
examples.en: He switches off his phone in the evening.
She switched off the machine.
I switched off the light.

senses.en: to switch on, to turn on
senses.example_en: Please switch on the light.

examples.en: I am turning on the oven.
He switched on the radio.
Who turned on the heating?

senses.example_en: We are setting off now.
The film is about to start.

examples.en: We are setting off early tomorrow.
She set off without me.
The concert started on time.

senses.example_de: Geben Sie bitte Ihren Namen an.
senses.example_en: Please state your name.

senses.example_de: Er gibt mit seinem Auto an.
senses.example_en: He shows off with his car.

examples.de: Sie gibt ihre Adresse im Formular an.
examples.en: She gives her address on the form.

examples.de: Er gab eine falsche Nummer an.
examples.en: He gave a wrong number.
I provided my phone number.

senses.example_de: So ein Fehler kommt selten vor.
senses.example_en: Such a mistake rarely occurs.

senses.note: + Dativ: Das kommt mir seltsam vor.
senses.example_en: That seems strange to me.

examples.de: Dieses Wort kommt im Text oft vor.
examples.en: This word occurs often in the text.

examples.de: So etwas kam früher nie vor.
examples.en: Something like that never happened before.

examples.de: Das ist mir noch nie vorgekommen.
examples.en: That has never happened to me.

senses.en: to occur to, to come to mind
senses.example_de: Mir fällt sein Name nicht ein.
senses.example_en: His name does not come to my mind.

examples.de: Dir fällt bestimmt eine Lösung ein.
examples.en: You will surely think of a solution.

examples.de: Ihr fiel eine gute Idee ein.
examples.en: A good idea occurred to her.

examples.de: Die Antwort ist mir zu spät eingefallen.
examples.en: The answer came to me too late.

senses.example_de: Er drückt seine Gefühle gut aus.
senses.example_en: He expresses his feelings well.

examples.de: Sie drückt ihre Meinung klar aus.
examples.en: She expresses her opinion clearly.
He expressed his thanks.

examples.de: Du hast das sehr gut ausgedrückt.
examples.en: You expressed that very well.

senses.example_en: The money is not enough.

examples.en: One hour is enough for that.

examples.de: Das Essen reichte für alle aus.
examples.en: The food was enough for everyone.

examples.de: Die Zeit hat leider nicht ausgereicht.
examples.en: Unfortunately the time was not enough.

senses.example_de: Wir setzen die Reise morgen fort.
senses.example_en: We are continuing the journey tomorrow.

examples.de: Er setzt seine Arbeit nach der Pause fort.
examples.en: He continues his work after the break.

examples.de: Sie setzte das Studium im Herbst fort.
examples.en: She continued her studies in autumn.

examples.de: Wir haben das Gespräch später fortgesetzt.
examples.en: We continued the conversation later.

senses.en: to catch up on, to make up for
senses.example_de: Ich hole die Prüfung nächste Woche nach.
senses.example_en: I am making up the exam next week.

examples.de: Sie holt den Kurs im Sommer nach.
examples.en: She is making up the course in summer.

examples.de: Er holte den Unterricht später nach.
examples.en: He made up the lesson later.
I caught up on a lot of sleep.

senses.example_de: Die Kinder schauen dem Spiel zu.
senses.example_en: The children are watching the game.

examples.de: Ich schaue den Vögeln gern zu.
examples.en: I like watching the birds.
We watched the fireworks.
Did you watch while cooking?

senses.en: to cover up, to tuck in
senses.note: sich zudecken = to cover oneself up
senses.example_de: Die Mutter deckt das Kind zu.
senses.example_en: The mother tucks the child in.

examples.en: I am covering the pot.

examples.de: Sie deckte das Baby warm zu.
examples.en: She tucked the baby in warmly.

examples.de: Er hat sich mit der Decke zugedeckt.
examples.en: He covered himself with the blanket.

senses.example_en: Would you like to take off your jacket?

senses.example_de: Sie legt im Mai die Prüfung ab.
senses.example_en: She is taking the exam in May.

examples.de: Er legt den Mantel an der Garderobe ab.
examples.en: He takes off his coat at the cloakroom.

examples.de: Sie legte die Prüfung mit Erfolg ab.
examples.en: She passed the exam successfully.

examples.de: Ich habe den Test gestern abgelegt.
examples.en: I took the test yesterday.

senses.example_en: The company produces furniture.

examples.en: The factory manufactures cars.

examples.de: Man stellte hier früher Papier her.
examples.en: Paper used to be produced here.

examples.de: Wo hat man diesen Käse hergestellt?
examples.en: Where was this cheese produced?

senses.example_en: We are finding out the truth.

examples.en: She always finds out everything.

examples.de: Er fand die Adresse schnell heraus.
examples.en: He quickly found out the address.
Did you find out the reason?

senses.example_en: Please come in!

examples.de: Durch das Fenster kommt kalte Luft herein.
examples.en: Cold air comes in through the window.
She came in quietly.
He came in without knocking.
Do come in!

senses.example_en: Don't let go of my hand!

examples.de: Der Hund lässt den Ball nicht los.
examples.en: The dog won't let go of the ball.
She let go of the rope.
He let go of my hand.

senses.example_de: Ich schlage das Wort im Wörterbuch nach.
senses.example_en: I am looking up the word in the dictionary.

examples.de: Er schlägt die Regel im Buch nach.
examples.en: He looks up the rule in the book.
She looked up the vocabulary word.
I looked up the date.

senses.example_de: Er nimmt mir das Buch weg.
senses.example_en: He is taking the book away from me.

examples.de: Sie nimmt dem Kind die Schere weg.
examples.en: She takes the scissors away from the child.

examples.de: Er nahm mir den Ball weg.
examples.en: He took the ball away from me.
Who took my pen away?

senses.example_en: The dog is running away.

examples.de: Die Katze läuft vor dem Hund weg.
examples.en: The cat runs away from the dog.
The child simply ran away.
My hamster ran away.

senses.example_de: Der Regen hält uns nicht auf.
senses.example_en: The rain won't stop us.

senses.example_de: Er hält sich oft in Berlin auf.
senses.example_en: He often stays in Berlin.

examples.de: Sie hält die Tür für mich auf.
examples.en: She holds the door open for me.

examples.de: Ein Unfall hielt uns lange auf.
examples.en: An accident held us up for a long time.

examples.de: Der Streik hat viele Reisende aufgehalten.
examples.en: The strike held up many travelers.

senses.example_de: Sie geht gut mit Kindern um.
senses.example_en: She is good with children.

examples.de: Er geht vorsichtig mit dem Glas um.
examples.en: He handles the glass carefully.

examples.de: Sie ging ruhig mit dem Problem um.
examples.en: She dealt with the problem calmly.
We treated each other fairly.

senses.example_en: He is teaching me chess.

examples.de: Sie bringt den Kindern Schwimmen bei.
examples.en: She teaches the children how to swim.

examples.de: Mein Opa brachte mir das Angeln bei.
examples.en: My grandpa taught me how to fish.
Who taught you that?

senses.example_en: Please don't interrupt me!

examples.en: He interrupts the conversation.

examples.de: Sie unterbrach ihre Reise in Köln.
examples.en: She interrupted her journey in Cologne.

examples.de: Der Lärm hat den Unterricht unterbrochen.
examples.en: The noise interrupted the lesson.

senses.example_de: Wir verbringen den Sommer am Meer.
senses.example_en: We are spending the summer by the sea.

examples.de: Sie verbringt viel Zeit mit ihrer Oma.
examples.en: She spends a lot of time with her grandma.

examples.de: Er verbrachte das Wochenende zu Hause.
examples.en: He spent the weekend at home.

examples.de: Wo habt ihr den Urlaub verbracht?
examples.en: Where did you spend your vacation?

senses.example_de: Die Sonne verschwindet hinter den Wolken.
senses.example_en: The sun disappears behind the clouds.

examples.en: The train disappears into the tunnel.

examples.de: Der Mann verschwand in der Menge.
examples.en: The man disappeared into the crowd.
My key has disappeared.

senses.example_en: Children like inventing stories.

examples.en: He always invents new games.
She invented a new machine.
Who invented the wheel?

senses.example_en: Do you still recognize me?

examples.en: I recognize his voice immediately.

examples.de: Sie erkannte ihn an der Brille.
examples.en: She recognized him by his glasses.
I have recognized my mistake.

senses.en: to be startled, to get a fright
senses.example_de: Das Kind erschrickt vor dem Hund.
senses.example_en: The child is startled by the dog.

examples.en: She gets startled at every sound.
I was startled by the lightning.
We got a big fright.

senses.en: to arise, to come into being
senses.example_en: A new house is being built here.

examples.en: A park is being created by the river.

examples.de: Das Dorf entstand vor hundert Jahren.
examples.en: The village came into being a hundred years ago.

examples.de: Durch den Sturm ist großer Schaden entstanden.
examples.en: The storm caused great damage.

senses.example_en: Please remove the stain.

senses.example_de: Ich begegne ihr oft im Park.
senses.example_en: I often run into her in the park.

examples.de: Manchmal begegne ich ihm im Bus.
examples.en: Sometimes I run into him on the bus.
He ran into an old friend.

examples.de: Wir sind uns schon einmal begegnet.
examples.en: We have met once before.

senses.example_en: I don't grasp the task.

examples.en: He grasps new topics quickly.
She grasped the rule immediately.
I have finally understood it.

senses.example_en: You can keep the book.

examples.en: He always keeps calm.

examples.de: Sie behielt das Geheimnis für sich.
examples.en: She kept the secret to herself.
I kept the receipt.

senses.example_en: I notice the mistake immediately.
The saleswoman advises the customers.

examples.en: The doctor advises the patient.
He advised me on the purchase.
We were given good advice.

senses.example_en: The boss determines the plan.
He quietly enters the room.

examples.de: Sie betritt den Saal als Erste.
examples.en: She is the first to enter the hall.
The teacher entered the classroom.

examples.de: Ich habe den Raum nie betreten.
examples.en: I have never entered the room.

senses.example_de: Das Hotel befindet sich am Bahnhof.
senses.example_en: The hotel is located at the train station.

examples.en: The toilet is located on the left.

examples.de: Das Büro befand sich im ersten Stock.
examples.en: The office was located on the first floor.

senses.example_en: He does not mention the problem.
The police are chasing the thief.
She follows the news closely.
Tell me your secret!
He does not betray his friends.

examples.en: She never reveals her plan.
He revealed the recipe to us.
Who told you that?

senses.example_en: I am giving away my old books.
Time passes so quickly.

examples.en: The pain will soon pass.
The winter passed slowly.
The year passed quickly.

senses.example_en: We are preventing an accident.
The company is raising the prices.

senses.example_de: Wir beenden die Arbeit um fünf.
senses.example_en: We finish the work at five.
I prefer tea in the morning.
The man confesses to the theft.

examples.en: He confesses his mistake.
The thief confessed everything.
She confessed to the deed.

senses.example_en: We are getting into a traffic jam.

examples.en: He easily gets into a panic.

examples.de: Das Schiff geriet in einen Sturm.
examples.en: The ship got into a storm.
She got into difficulties.

senses.example_en: When will we find out the result?

examples.de: Er erfährt alles von seiner Nachbarin.
examples.en: He learns everything from his neighbor.

examples.de: Sie erfuhr die Nachricht im Radio.
examples.en: She learned the news on the radio.

examples.de: Ich habe es erst gestern erfahren.
examples.en: I only found out yesterday.

senses.example_en: He tears up the old letter.

examples.en: The dog tears up the newspaper.
She tore up the photo.
He tore up the note.

senses.example_en: This company no longer exists.
We are designing the poster together.

senses.example_de: Der Fluss fließt durch die Stadt.
senses.example_en: The river flows through the city.

examples.en: The water flows quickly here.
A stream used to flow here.

examples.de: Der Regen ist in den Keller geflossen.
examples.en: The rain flowed into the basement.

senses.example_de: Das Baby greift nach dem Ball.
senses.example_en: The baby reaches for the ball.

examples.en: He reaches for his bag.

examples.de: Sie griff schnell nach dem Kind.
examples.en: She quickly grabbed the child.
I reached for the telephone.

senses.example_en: She rides every Saturday.

examples.en: He likes riding on the beach.
We rode through the forest.
Have you ever ridden a horse?

senses.example_de: Er schießt den Ball ins Tor.
senses.example_en: He shoots the ball into the goal.

examples.en: The player shoots at the goal.
She scored the first goal.
Who scored the goal?

senses.example_de: Die Katze schleicht durch den Garten.
senses.example_en: The cat creeps through the garden.

examples.de: Er schleicht leise die Treppe hinauf.
examples.en: He sneaks quietly up the stairs.
She sneaked out of the house.

examples.de: Der Dieb ist ins Haus geschlichen.
examples.en: The thief sneaked into the house.

senses.example_en: Prices fall in winter.

examples.de: Die Temperatur sinkt in der Nacht.
examples.en: The temperature drops at night.

examples.de: Das Schiff sank vor der Küste.
examples.en: The ship sank off the coast.

examples.de: Die Zahl der Fehler ist gesunken.
examples.en: The number of mistakes has fallen.

senses.example_en: We do a lot of sport.

senses.example_de: Das Boot treibt auf dem See.
senses.example_en: The boat is drifting on the lake.

examples.en: She does sport every day.
The wood was drifting in the river.

examples.de: Früher habe ich viel Sport getrieben.
examples.en: I used to do a lot of sport.

senses.example_en: Nobody is forcing you to do it.

examples.de: Der Regen zwingt uns zur Pause.
examples.en: The rain forces us to take a break.

examples.de: Das Wetter zwang ihn zur Rückkehr.
examples.en: The weather forced him to return.
I was forced to do it.

senses.example_en: The ticket is valid for one month.

examples.en: This rule applies to everyone.
The offer was only valid yesterday.

examples.de: Die alte Regel hat lange gegolten.
examples.en: The old rule was valid for a long time.

senses.example_en: The garbage stinks terribly.

examples.en: The old cheese stinks strongly.
It stank of smoke.
It stank in the basement.

senses.example_en: She nods and smiles.

senses.note: den Kopf schütteln = to shake one's head
senses.example_en: He shakes his head.

senses.example_de: Ich stecke den Schlüssel ins Schloss.
senses.example_en: I put the key into the lock.
Where is my phone hiding?

senses.example_de: Das Kind winkt aus dem Zug.
senses.example_en: The child waves from the train.

senses.en: to suspect, to have a feeling
senses.example_en: I have a bad feeling.
Please form a sentence.
Reading educates.

senses.note: + Dativ; dienen als = to serve as
senses.example_de: Das Sofa dient auch als Bett.
senses.example_en: The sofa also serves as a bed.
She hurries to the train station.
We must act quickly.

senses.example_de: Das Buch handelt von einer Reise.
senses.example_en: The book is about a journey.

senses.example_de: Das Team kämpft bis zum Ende.
senses.example_en: The team fights until the end.

senses.example_de: Das Fahrrad lehnt an der Wand.
senses.example_en: The bicycle is leaning against the wall.
Smoking harms your health.

senses.example_de: Die Mutter schimpft mit dem Kind.
senses.example_en: The mother scolds the child.
The shop is lowering the prices.
I feel the cold wind.

senses.example_de: Sie stammt aus einer kleinen Stadt.
senses.example_en: She comes from a small town.
The sun is shining in the sky.
The child is beaming with joy.
The cat kills the mouse.
I don't trust him.

senses.example_de: Sie traut sich nicht ins Wasser.
senses.example_en: She doesn't dare go into the water.

senses.en: to have an effect, to work
senses.example_en: The pill works quickly.
He seems very tired today.
She hesitates for a moment.
Her eyes are shining with joy.
The children are hopping in the garden.
